payload.answer: Possible conflict candidate: one write says Sam works at Goldman, while the other says Sam joined Point72. These may refer to different times or different Sams, so the relationship is ambiguous.
citations: Concurrent writes - Sam works at Goldman Sam joined Point72

entity_resolution.reason: The name Sam is ambiguous; insufficient evidence to confirm whether the two statements refer to the same person or represent a time-based update.

evidence.reason: Both statements describe Sam's employer/affiliation and may conflict if they refer to the same person and time period.
